exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Contains 50 sections plus sublease schedule. Parts: 1. Definitions, 2. Site Deposit Addendum, 3. Confidentiality Agreement and Agreement Not to Compete, 4. Current Form of General Release, 5. Authorization Agreement for Preauthorized Payments

exhibits.name: Wal-Mart Master Lease Agreement (2009 MLA), Appendixes, Amendments
exhibits.notes: Governs vast majority of franchise locations. Contains performance covenants, termination provisions, renewal mechanics.

exhibits.name: Sample HEB Lease
exhibits.notes: Sample lease for HEB grocery store locations

exhibits.name: Rider to Lease
exhibits.notes: Required lease rider for non-party-tenant locations granting franchisor assignment rights

exhibits.name: The Exchange Addendum to Franchise Agreement
Franchise Commencement Agreement
exhibits.notes: Memorializes term, commencement date, expiration, sq footage, monthly amounts after site confirmation

exhibits.name: List of State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
State Specific Addendum to Disclosure Document and Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Includes California addendum (fee deferral, noncompete enforceability, governing law override) and others. California DFPI imposed fee deferral condition.

exhibits.name: Table of Contents, Confidential Operations Manual
exhibits.notes: COM is 120 pages total; this is the TOC only

exhibits.name: Snow White Package, Lists of Contents
exhibits.notes: Itemized contents of the turnkey salon package (ProtoDesign)

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited consolidated financial statements for FY2024 and FY2023 by Kolder, Slaven & Company, LLC. Clean opinion. Includes balance sheet, income statement, cash flow, equity changes, notes, and supplemental schedules (unaudited).

exhibits.name: List of Current Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 537 franchised outlets as of FY2024 end. PII — not extracted.

exhibits.name: List of Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Transferred, cancelled, terminated, not renewed, or left system during 2024. PII — not extracted.

exhibits.name: Receipt
exhibits.notes: Two copies — one to return signed to franchisor
